---
title: 'Start Here'
date: '2016-10-11T01:11:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'It''s Author Fun'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '4020005994005796378'
blogger_filename: '/p/what-is-this.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/It_s Author Fun/feed.atom'
---

<br />
<b><span style="font-size: large;">Hello... My name is Darrell Wolfe</span></b><br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<br /></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/whoami2-9c31a552a57b.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/whoami2-8c0ce3d101d1.jpg" width="200" /></a></div>
<br />
<h4>
<span style="font-size: large;">What is this blog about?</span></h4>
I've decided to try my hand at Fiction. I dabbled in years past but never took it seriously. I've decided to turn this into an area of study for me. Therefore you find fiction posts here, and posts about fiction. It helps to set up some parameters to focus.<br />
<br />
<h4>
<span style="font-size: large;">Who would read this blog?</span></h4>
Those who enjoy Science Fiction, Fantasy, Spiritual Fiction, stories that move, stories that make you go... Hmm.&nbsp;You have this nagging feeling like there is something 'more' to this life, and it's just beyond your grasp. You may be an avid reader&nbsp;/ avid writer or both.<br />
<br />
<h4>
<span style="font-size: large;">You Can Expect</span></h4>
This blog is primarily for me to work out the nitty-gritty details of fiction writing. Which means lots of practice. I'll write here as often as I have time, I've scheduled once a week, and when I'm inspired to do more. However please note that I may have no post one week, and then 3 on one day, and then 3 per day for 3 days... etc.<br />
<br />
<h4>
<span style="font-size: large;">I Expect</span></h4>
Participation! I'd love to hear from you. What am I doing wrong? What am I doing right? What have I taught you that you didn't already know? Would you like to teach me about something? Let's grow in this fiction craft together.<br />
<br />
<h4>
<b><span style="font-size: large;">Focus Areas</span></b></h4>
<ul>
<li><b>Fiction Writing</b></li>
<ul>
<li>Posts where I will play with fiction content.&nbsp;</li>
<li>Short Stories</li>
<li>Long Stories</li>
<li>Continuous Stories, some may even turn into a book</li>
<li>Other fiction content</li>
</ul>
<li><b>Fiction Research</b></li>
<ul>
<li>Character Interviews</li>
<li>Background and Back-story Research</li>
<li>Character Bibliographies</li>
<li>Other writing required to flesh out the story.</li>
</ul>
<li><b>About Fiction Writing</b></li>
<ul>
<li>Book Reports, as I read books about writing fiction I will report the important information here for my own cataloging purposes.&nbsp;</li>
<li>Notes To Self</li>
<li>Content from other fiction writers, tips, ideas, etc</li>
</ul>
</ul>
<br />
<strong>Darrell G. Wolfe,</strong><br />
<br />
Storyteller | Writer | Thinker | Multipotentialite at <a href="http://darrellwolfe.com/" target="_blank">DarrellWolfe.com</a> and <a href="http://dgwolfe.weebly.com/" target="_blank">DGWolfe.weebly.com</a><br />
<div style="font-family: 'Trebuchet MS'; font-size: 12pt;">
<div>
<span id="ff062ecb092e49dcaa90ed764cf87dcf">
</span></div>
</div>
